headlines.title: Comcast to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky into separate company
headlines.description: Comcast said Monday that it plans to spin off NBCUniversal into a separate publicly traded company, the latest shift in an industry grappling with rapid technological change and new consumer habits

headlines.title: Voters of both parties want tighter AI regulation, poll finds
headlines.description: A new survey from the AI Policy Institute finds bipartisan support for legislation that targets powerful AI systems.

headlines.title: U.S. government gives Anthropic green light for limited re-release of Mythos 5
headlines.description: The U.S. government is allowing Anthropic to deploy its Mythos 5 model to a select group of customers and partners, according to a letter from Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick to Anthropic that was seen by NBC News

headlines.title: Apple’s shares plunge after it hikes prices on iPads and laptops
headlines.description: Apple said AI-fueled demand for memory chips has sent prices soaring, a market dynamic that some call “RAMageddon.”

headlines.title: An AI-generated Michael Caine is narrating Homer’s ‘Odyssey’ now
headlines.description: The voice generation company ElevenLabs released an audiobook version of the ancient Greek classic Tuesday.

headlines.title: Supreme Court allows states to count mail-in ballots that arrive late, rejecting RNC challenge
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — Rejecting a Republican National Committee challenge, the Supreme Court ruled Monday that elections officials may count mail-in ballots that arrive after Election Day if they were postmarked beforehand

headlines.title: Supreme Court rules Trump cannot fire Fed member Lisa Cook
headlines.description: The Supreme Court is rejecting President Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve board member Lisa Cook, but did grant him more power over other independent federal agencies in a separate decision. NBC News' Laura Jarrett reports on the two rulings and how the justices differed in their views of the president's authority.

headlines.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump’s push to overturn $5 million E. Jean Carroll verdict
headlines.description: The Supreme Court refused to hear President Donald Trump’s attempt to overturn a jury's finding that he sexually assaulted and defamed writer E. Jean Carroll.

headlines.title: Struggling to Focus? Here's How to Train Your Attention Span
headlines.description: In a world of constant distractions, it can be difficult to stay focused, so psychotherapist Niro Feliciano joins TODAY with tips on how to train your attention span. She advises setting time blocks, creating phone-free zones and touts the benefits of making lists.

headlines.title: Apple Announces it is Raising Prices on MacBooks and iPads
headlines.description: Apple said on Thursday it will immediately raise prices on its MacBook laptops, iPads and iMac desktop computers. The announcement sent Apple shares falling about six percent, the biggest drop in more than a year.

headlines.title: Physicist reacts to Trump executive order calling for a quantum computer
headlines.description: NBC News' Gadi Schwartz talks to California Institute of Technology Professor John Preskill about President Trump's executive order calling for a quantum computer. Preskill talks about what he hopes comes out of the order and what to look out for.

headlines.title: AI-generated Michael Caine voice to narrate new edition of the 'Odyssey'
headlines.description: An AI-generated replica of actor Michael Caine's voice will narrate a new edition of the "Odyssey," produced by the company ElevenLabs. The London-based company, which launched in 2023, has ramped up its efforts to woo talent as it seeks to win over creatives wary of AI.
